mapper.sql: i.item_id, i.classify_id, i.item_code, i.item_name, i.item_value, i.item_index, i.item_desc, i.item_attr1, i.item_attr2, i.item_attr3, i.item_attr4, i.item_attr5, i.item_attr6, i.status, i.create_time, i.last_update_time, i.create_by, i.last_update_by
mapper.select: SELECT , c.classify_name FROM openplatform_lookup_item_t i LEFT JOIN openplatform_lookup_classify_t c ON i.classify_id = c.classify_id WHERE i.item_id = #{itemId}
